name: Physician — Combined Employment and Locum Self-Employment with Large RRSP
description: Complete Dr. Aisha Kamara's 2024 Canadian personal income tax return. Her tax documents are located at C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\TaxDocuments\kamara\. Save the completed return as 'aisha_kamara.24t' in C:\Users\Docker\Documents\StudioTax\.

metadata.data_source: CRA T4 and T4A Slip Formats 2024; CRA Guide RC4110 (Employee or Self-employed)
metadata.occupation: Physician — hospital employee and independent locum practitioner
metadata.key_complexity: Dual income sources (T4 + T4A); T2125 professional services; multiple professional expense categories; maximum RRSP contribution ($28,900); married with spouse income
